user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor/controls text to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: In ui.js, the HUD (score, level, charge bar) is hidden when the game is paused due to the condition `phase !== "START" && phase !== "PAUSED"`. The feedback requests that the HUD remains visible during pause, but without showing any pause overlay or grayed-out screen.

- Files affected: ui.js

- Changes needed: Change the HUD rendering condition from `phase !== "START" && phase !== "PAUSED"` to `phase !== "START"`. This will keep the HUD visible during pause while maintaining the current behavior of not showing any pause overlay (which is already correctly absent).
